name: Lemon Glazed Poppyseed Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup baking Butter, Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike (t, soft)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the softened Baking Butter, sugar and eggs until almost smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients in a large mixing bowl. Mix just until there are no more lumps.
3. Pour batter into a vegetable-sprayed Bundt pan.
4. Bake at 325°F for 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
5. Immediately turn cake over onto a serving platter to cool.
6. Mix the powdered sugar and lemon juice together until smooth, to make glaze.
7. Once the cake is completely cooled, drizzle glaze over top.
